name: Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, corn meal, onion powder, salt, milk, egg and water. Stir well until there are no lumps.
2. Add the orange food coloring if desired for a more vibrant batter color.
3. Cut the onions into thick slices (about 1/2 inch).
4. Use only the outer rings of the onions for best appearance.
5. Dip each onion ring into the batter, ensuring it is fully coated.
6. Carefully lower the coated onion rings into a deep fryer filled with hot oil.
7. Fry until golden brown.
8. Remove from the oil and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve immediately with Bar-B-Que sauce or your preferred dipping sauce.
